Major Updates

Release Canidate #1 (4/15/25)
Weekly Update #8 (4/13/25)
Weekly Update #7 (4/9/25)



Technical Difficulties, please stand by!

April 20, 2025 - Gordon Freakman


Mod delayed because of a massive betrayal of trust.






I'm really sorry this happened, but on April 15, one of the playtesters (Bluu) decided to send an internal testing build to someone who they know I have major PTSD over, and knew I had major trust issues with.

I was only alerted today.






Why does this require a massive delay?

I'd like the first public build to massively overshadow that build if it ever surfaces, which the current build does not. This is also very mentally taxing for me, I knew Bluu for a long time, so this is a lot to go through.

I'm still going to continue actively developing it, don't get me wrong, but I'm struggling to cope with this, so development is probably going to slow down a little bit before I've fully moved on.
